title: Add vertical MCP tool invocation contract tests
description: Current: vertical tool handlers are mostly covered by unit tests, but integration contract checks are inconsistent at MCP handler level. Expected: table-driven integration tests execute vertical MCP handlers with minimal valid payloads and enforce the same response contract assertions used for core tools.
acceptance_criteria: Vertical-tool matrix entries are invoked through MCP handlers in a single parameterized suite
Each vertical tool test enforces shared response contract assertions
Test failures identify the exact tool and payload fixture that broke
out_of_scope: Rewriting existing unit tests for tool internals
